name: sqlite3-viewer
description: Pluggable SQLite database viewer: a Fastify plugin and a React/Blueprint component, published as two npm packages from one repo.

scripts.check-types: npm run check-types -w sqlite3-viewer-backend && npm run check-types -w sqlite3-viewer-frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w sqlite3-viewer-backend && npm run clean -w sqlite3-viewer-frontend
scripts.test: npm run test-only && npm run check-types && npm run eslint && npm run prettier
scripts.test-only: npm run test-only -w sqlite3-viewer-backend && npm run test-only -w sqlite3-viewer-frontend
scripts.tsc: npm run tsc -w sqlite3-viewer-backend && npm run tsc -w sqlite3-viewer-frontend
